overview: Exclusive clinic providing testosterone replacement therapy for men and comprehensive hormone management for women. Delivers care through customized wellness plans with all-inclusive monthly pricing covering medications, labs, supplies, and visits.
highlights: All-inclusive monthly pricing with no per-visit fees
In-office weekly injections or at-home self-administration
Also offers PRP and peptide therapy
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone optimization; also serves women interested in hormone management.
